name: quick actions strip model-authored skill tags

source.purpose: Quick actions are player-facing intents, not hidden roll bindings. Code strips model-authored bracket tags and leaves roll skill selection to request_roll time.

narrator.prose: The clerk lets the comm keep chiming while the ledger stays open between you.

inputActions: Review the maintenance logs for the missing interval. [Survival]
Press the clerk for the withheld answer. [Persuasion]
outputActionsInclude: Review the maintenance logs for the missing interval.
Press the clerk for the withheld answer.
outputActionsExclude: Review the maintenance logs for the missing interval. [Survival]
Press the clerk for the withheld answer. [Persuasion]
